prompt: Explain architecture tradeoffs between local_only and external_reasoning_with_compaction for enterprise reliability.
Why does escalation discipline block product workflow prompts and when should it allow override?
Explain end-to-end lifecycle from before_agent_start to llm_output continuation with failure taxonomy.
How should we justify benchmark savings claims under buyer scrutiny with defensible assumptions?
Explain if pass_through_direct should ever count toward external avoided and defend your position.
What are the major false-positive risks in leakage audit and how to reduce them without overfitting?
Explain prompt cleanup precedence rules and where context can still be lost in edge wrappers.
How should we design model-pricing abstraction to support multiple providers without drift?
Explain when local_try_then_fallback should be disabled to avoid hidden externalization pressure.
Compare deterministic token estimation versus provider-tokenizer estimation for product claims.
Explain how to prove latency claims while separating backend, continuation, and end-to-end timings.
How do we maintain strict internal-debug stripping while preserving enough model-facing context quality?
Explain tradeoffs of conservative external baseline cost versus prompt-sensitive baseline in benchmarks.
What controls prevent metric gaming in sales demos and pilot reporting?
Explain limitations of single-tenant local DB telemetry and migration path to multi-tenant operation.
Give a rigorous explanation of why local-first should be trusted for cost reduction claims.
